numbers.offer_status: buyer backed out — said property not good

deals.summary: Asking $30K. We had a buyer at $20K, but she walked the property and backed out, saying it's not good. No active buyers right now.
deals.next_action: Either find new buyers willing to look past condition or have an honest talk with owner about price vs condition. If neither shifts, archive.

deals.summary: Asking $220K. Owner already fixed it up — they're flipping. Most likely no fit for our wholesale model.
